name: CyberPower SL950U Standby 950VA/510W UPS System - Simulated Sine Wave - 8x NEMA 5-15P Outlets (3 surge only, 5 surge + battery backup) - 120 VAC+/-5% - 15A - USB-A & USB-C Charging Ports (20W total) - USB Management Port (SL950U)
